title: McCarthy Tétrault Bolsters Cross-Border M&A Expertise with New Partner Luke Carsley
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Bolsters Cross-Border M&A Expertise with New Partner Luke Carsley
McCarthy Tétrault welcomes Luke Carsley as a partner in the firm’s Business Law Group in Montréal. Luke is a seasoned dealmaker with over 20 years of cross-border experience in mergers and acquisitions, private equity, venture capital and capital markets.
Luke represents both buyers and sellers in a diverse range of public and private M&A transactions. He provides strategic counsel on private equity and venture capital investments, with a focus on sectors such as fintech, insurtech, biotech and other emerging technologies. His expertise also extends to advising issuers, investors and underwriters in public and private capital-raising transactions. Additionally, Luke offers comprehensive corporate governance and securities law advice to companies operating in multiple industries and markets.
“Luke’s depth of knowledge in cross-border M&A, combined with his experience in M&A, private equity and capital markets makes him an invaluable addition to our team," said Éric Gosselin , Partner, and National Business Law Practice Group Leader. "Luke's strategic, industry-focused advice will greatly benefit our clients in navigating complex transactions."
With expertise in the industries that matter most to the global business landscape, our M&A Group has the proven experience to get deals done. Clients benefit from our history of industry-focused advice and perspective. No matter the size or complexity, McCarthy Tétrault has a leading position advising on the transactions most important to your business, such as mergers, acquisitions, divestitures, joint ventures and partnerships in a wide range of industries. Our M&A Group specializes in advising clients on the largest and most innovative domestic and international deals. We have knowledge and expertise in every type of M&A transaction, and we have played a principal role acting for every type of transaction participant. Learn how our team can help you.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact:
- Lucas H. Carsley Partner People.Offices.Singular Montréal
